items.title: Watch: Today at the Test
items.summary: Highlights of day four of the Lord's Test match between England Women and India Women.
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Alexander Zverev and the contours of tennis’ new ‘Big Three’
items.summary: By putting up a spirited challenge against World No. 1 Jannik Sinner in the Wimbledon final, the burly German proved that he was getting closer to the Italian and Spaniard Carlo...

items.title: Villa working on deal for Switzerland's Manzambi
items.summary: Aston Villa are working on a deal for Freiburg midfielder Johan Manzambi as they attempt to hijack a move to Newcastle United.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
